feed.title: Eduardo de la Rosa | Engineering & Automation Portfolio
feed.subtitle: Innovative Mechatronics Engineer bridging the gap between embedded systems, cloud automation, and data-driven architectures
feed.author: Eduardo de la Rosa Flores

entry.title: BMW Group - Bachelor's Thesis Student (Quality Management)
entry.summary: Centralized supplier-quality data in Palantir Foundry by combining 5 databases. Developed an AI pipeline (GPT-4.1 & PySpark) to automatically identify factory production issues with 94% accuracy, securing 100% data reliability via strict JSON validation.

entry.title: BMW Group - Data Engineering & AI Integration Intern
entry.summary: Automated big-data ETL pipelines in Python integrating LLM analytics via APIs to process quality records. Designed automated supplier performance dashboards utilized by a 15-engineer team and deployed a cloud web app integrating Google Fit API.

entry.title: SAP Talent Recruiting Days - On-Site Day!
entry.summary: Participated in the 100% on-site recruitment event at SAP Labs Latin America in Monterrey. The agenda included an exclusive Office Tour, an interactive session on Tips and Tricks for selecting processes, and a Speed Recruiting circuit with core engineering managers.

entry.title: Éxodo Al-Melek - Regional Subcoordinator
entry.summary: Led a multidisciplinary team of 20 people to plan, organize, and execute regional leadership and integration events for over 150 participants, adapting communication styles across multi-generational groups to build operational trust.

entry.title: HIL Test Bench for Power Management - International Motors Mexico
entry.summary: Engineered a 4-channel isolated power board (12V/5A) using solid-state switching for automated ECU validation. Developed ESP32 firmware parsing standard VISA commands for real-time I2C telemetry and designed a multi-threaded Python/Tkinter GUI.

entry.title: Autonomous Mobile Robotics - John Deere Advanced Control
entry.summary: Designed and engineered an autonomous 4WD skid-steer vehicle prototype in collaboration with John Deere. Formulated formal Dynamic Plant Identification in MATLAB utilizing structural Step Response and Autoregressive with Exogenous Input (ARX) modeling matrices to map mechanical friction and motor profiles with over 70% accuracy. Implemented a deterministic multi-loop control architecture on an STM32 MCU, integrating 4 independent speed PI loops via 12-bit PWM resolution (0.8mV increments) and 4 EXTI encoder lines, cascaded under a master orientation PI tracking loop using digital high-pass filtered MPU6050 gyroscope telemetry.

entry.title: Dual-Core Smart Tire Inflation Platform - John Deere Advanced Embedded Systems
entry.summary: Engineered a dual-core asymmetric multiprocessing (AMP) tire-inflation system on an STM32H7 MCU (ARM Cortex-M7 @480MHz & Cortex-M4 @240MHz) in collaboration with John Deere. Programmed a deterministic hardware boot-handshake protocol using Hardware Semaphores (HSEM) to synchronize multi-domain core executions. Implemented high-resolution 16-bit ADC sensor sampling and multi-loop discrete PID tracking on the CM7 core, linked via a 500 Kbps FDCAN industrial multiplexed network to receive remote target setpoints, complemented by an independent FreeRTOS and FATFS supervisor subsystem running on the CM4 core.

entry.title: RTOS-Based Automotive Infotainment System
entry.summary: Developed during sophomore year (4th semester) of Mechatronics Engineering. Formulated an advanced, distributed client-server architecture combining FreeRTOS kernel routines with high-level Python script loops on a Raspberry Pi multimedia engine. Engineered a deterministic, 4-task real-time firmware execution flow on an STM32F103 micro-controller, utilizing thread-safe message queues to eliminate UI blocking states during I/O processing. Features a comprehensive 4-year engineering retrospective evaluating sophomore-year architectural trade-offs against production-grade automotive standards (CAN/LIN networks, EXTI hardware interrupts, and CRC packet framing).

entry.title: Corporate IoT Health Dashboard & Google Fit API
entry.summary: Engineered a full-stack corporate health tracking and gamification dashboard utilizing Flask, SQLAlchemy, and PostgreSQL deployed on the Railway cloud infrastructure. Architected a dynamic data pipeline integrating Google Fit REST API endpoints via OAuth 2.0 authorization, processing customized tracking frames into nanosecond-level aggregations to extract hourly step metrics. Authored a responsive, German-localized user dashboard via Jinja2 templates featuring mathematical real-time progress calculations against enterprise benchmarks, supplemented by a comprehensive architectural security audit.

entry.title: Career Essentials in GitHub Professional Certificate
entry.summary: Earned professional credential verifying expertise in automated software pipelines, containerized environments (Docker), workflow orchestration via GitHub Actions, and deployment security hardening.

entry.title: ABB Certification: Cobots for Material Handling
entry.summary: Completed the official ABB industrial training curriculum for collaborative robotics (Cobots) applied to material handling operations. Acquired technical core competencies in human-robot collaboration (HRC) paradigms, safety configuration parameters under strict ISO/TS 15066 standards (force/power limiting and speed monitoring), Tool Center Point (TCP) calibration, and dynamic payload definitions. Developed practical skills in advanced trajectory planning, cycle-time efficiency, and virtual commissioning using the ABB RobotStudio ecosystem.

entry.title: German Language Mastery - B2 Proficiency
entry.summary: Attained certified B2 competence while living and studying engineering methodologies in Hamburg, Germany. Fully capable of professional collaboration and industrial documentation authoring in German environments.

entry.title: French Language Experience - B1 Progression
entry.summary: Immersive linguistic and cultural engineering track in Nice, France, advancing capabilities up to independent B1 operation for cross-functional multi-continental teams.

entry.title: English Language Fluency - C1 Professional (Duolingo Verified)
entry.summary: Verified C1 advanced proficiency level. Domination of fluent technical terminology, complex technical documentation parsing, and cross-border project management architectures.
